mapper.select:
select * from ( select concat('FALL-', fr.id) id, fr.id sourceId, 'FALL' eventType, e.name elderName, fr.fall_time eventTime, '跌倒告警' eventTitle, ifnull(fr.severity, 'LOW') eventLevel, case when fr.handle_result is not null and fr.handle_result != '' then 'DONE' else 'PENDING' end eventStatus, concat('位置：', ifnull(fr.fall_location, '未记录'), '；处理：', ifnull(fr.handle_result, '待处理')) eventContent, '/record/fallRecordList' sourceUrl from t_fall_record fr left join t_elder e on fr.elder_id = e.id
union all
select concat('HEALTH-', hd.id) id, hd.id sourceId, 'HEALTH' eventType, e.name elderName, hd.record_time eventTime, '健康指标异常' eventTitle, case when (hdt.spo2 is not null and hd.spo2 < hdt.spo2) or (hdt.heart_rate_high is not null and hd.heart_rate > hdt.heart_rate_high) then 'HIGH' else 'MEDIUM' end eventLevel, 'PENDING' eventStatus, concat('血压 ', ifnull(hd.blood_pressure, '-'), '；血糖 ', hd.blood_glucose, '；心率 ', hd.heart_rate, '；血氧 ', hd.spo2, '；体温 ', hd.temperature) eventContent, '/healthData/list' sourceUrl from t_health_data hd left join t_elder e on hd.elder_id = e.id left join t_health_data_threshold hdt on hdt.id = 1 where (hdt.blood_glucose_high is not null and hd.blood_glucose > hdt.blood_glucose_high) or (hdt.blood_glucose_low is not null and hd.blood_glucose < hdt.blood_glucose_low) or (hdt.heart_rate_high is not null and hd.heart_rate > hdt.heart_rate_high) or (hdt.heart_rate_low is not null and hd.heart_rate < hdt.heart_rate_low) or (hdt.spo2 is not null and hd.spo2 < hdt.spo2) or (hdt.temperature_high is not null and hd.temperature > hdt.temperature_high) or (hdt.temperature_low is not null and hd.temperature < hdt.temperature_low) or ( hd.blood_pressure is not null and instr(hd.blood_pressure, '/') > 0 and ( (hdt.blood_pressure_high is not null and cast(substring_index(hd.blood_pressure, '/', 1) as decimal(8,2)) > hdt.blood_pressure_high) or (hdt.blood_pressure_low is not null and cast(substring_index(hd.blood_pressure, '/', -1) as decimal(8,2)) < hdt.blood_pressure_low) ) )
union all
select concat('REMINDER-', rt.id) id, rt.id sourceId, 'REMINDER' eventType, e.name elderName, rt.remind_time eventTime, '提醒任务待处理' eventTitle, case when rt.remind_time < now() then 'MEDIUM' else 'LOW' end eventLevel, rt.status eventStatus, concat( '任务：', rt.task_title, '；类型：', case rt.task_type when 'MEDICATION' then '用药' when 'MEAL' then '用餐' when 'ACTIVITY' then '活动' when 'FOLLOW_UP' then '随访' when 'CHECKUP' then '体检' else rt.task_type end ) eventContent, '/record/reminderTaskList' sourceUrl from t_reminder_task rt left join t_elder e on rt.elder_id = e.id where rt.status = 'PENDING'
union all
select concat('DIALOG-', dr.id) id, dr.id sourceId, 'DIALOG' eventType, e.name elderName, dr.dialog_time eventTime, '异常情绪对话' eventTitle, case when dr.emotion = 'ANXIOUS' then 'MEDIUM' else 'LOW' end eventLevel, 'DONE' eventStatus, concat('发言人：', dr.speaker, '；情绪：', dr.emotion, '；内容：', dr.dialog_content) eventContent, '/record/dialogRecordList' sourceUrl from t_dialog_record dr left join t_elder e on dr.elder_id = e.id where dr.emotion in ('SAD', 'ANXIOUS') ) ev
and ev.elderName like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
and ev.eventType = #{eventType}
and ev.eventLevel = #{eventLevel}
and ev.eventStatus = #{eventStatus}
order by ev.eventTime desc, ev.id desc limit 200
